documentation.content: Any production Cloud Run 5xx response needs investigation. Check the active geo-backend revision logs, then verify /api/health/ready through Firebase Hosting before rollback or remediation.

conditions.displayName: At least one 5xx response in five minutes

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND resource.label.service_name="geo-backend" AND resource.label.location="australia-southeast1" AND metric.type="run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.label.response_code_class="5xx"
